title: A2 Core final checkpoint
subtitle: Use practical A2 English with control.
overview: Use practical A2 English with control.
A2 Core builds practical control: daily tasks, simple stories, short writing, listening repair, and clearer spoken output.

sections.title: A2 core focus
rows: I can handle daily tasks with clearer English.
我能用更清楚的英语处理日常任务。
I can tell simple stories, write short messages, and explain problems.
我能讲简单故事、写短消息并解释问题。
Are you ready for B1 Bridge?
你准备好进入 B1 Bridge 了吗？
Yes. I can use practical English with more detail.
准备好了。我能更详细地使用实用英语。

items.en: I can handle daily tasks with clearer English.
items.zh: 我能用更清楚的英语处理日常任务。

items.en: I can tell simple stories, write short messages, and explain problems.
items.zh: 我能讲简单故事、写短消息并解释问题。

items.en: Are you ready for B1 Bridge?
items.zh: 你准备好进入 B1 Bridge 了吗？

items.en: Yes. I can use practical English with more detail.
items.zh: 准备好了。我能更详细地使用实用英语。

items.en: This is practical A2 English I can use in real life.
items.zh: 这是我能在真实生活中使用的实用 A2 英语。

items.en: I will change the details and say it about myself.
items.zh: 我会改变细节，说成关于我自己的内容。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Are you ready for B1 Bridge?
lines.zh: 你准备好进入 B1 Bridge 了吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes. I can use practical English with more detail.
lines.zh: 准备好了。我能更详细地使用实用英语。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you give one more useful detail?
lines.zh: 你能再给一个有用的细节吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I can tell simple stories, write short messages, and explain problems.
lines.zh: 我能讲简单故事、写短消息并解释问题。

items.en: I can handle daily tasks with clearer English.
items.zh: 我能用更清楚的英语处理日常任务。

items.en: I can tell simple stories, write short messages, and explain problems.
items.zh: 我能讲简单故事、写短消息并解释问题。

items.en: Make a new version with your own place, time, or reason.
items.zh: 用你自己的地点、时间或原因造一个新版本。

items.en: Read it aloud until it sounds calm and natural.
items.zh: 大声朗读，直到听起来平稳自然。
